top_signals.title: Oil Rises on Doubts Over US, Iran Stance to End Conflict
top_signals.summary: Oil edged higher in choppy trading as the US and Iran appeared stuck at an impasse over several key issues needed to secure a peace deal and reopen the critical Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
top_signals.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Texas Fund Revealed as Record Backer of State Street Credit ETF
top_signals.summary: The identity of an investor that dramatically boosted assets in State Street Corp.’s private credit ETF has been revealed as a $60 billion sovereign wealth fund that provides funding to Texas public schools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
